case_title: DALE ABRAMS VS. MARKETNEXUS MEDIA, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.00 FILED BY ABRAMS, DALE AS TO DEFENDANT MARKETNEXUS MEDIA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER *(SC-108)* RECEIVED VIA CERTIFIED MAIL. FILED BY DEFENDANT MARKETNEXUS MEDIA, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-27-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARKETNEXUS MEDIA, INC.

MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY MARKETNEXUS MEDIA, INC. IS GRANTED. "MOTION TO DISMISS DUE TO INCORRECT VENUE GRANTED", PER PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID YANG. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY BRETT GOETSCHIOS--CEO. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-29-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABRAMS, DALE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARKETNEXUS MEDIA, INC. $550.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION (SC-108A) FILED BY DEFENDANT MARKETNEXUS MEDIA, INC. HEARING SET FOR JUN-07-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
(SC-108) "ANSWER" ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABRAMS, DALE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MARKETNEXUS MEDIA, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABRAMS, DALE AS TO DEFENDANT MARKETNEXUS MEDIA, INC.
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ABRAMS, DALE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2013 - JUDGMENT.

ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS) IS "GRANTED". SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION IS TO ASSIGN A NEW TRIAL DATE FOR HEARING ON DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE AND NOTIFY THE PARTIES BY MAIL.
STIPULATION HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID YANG. FILED BY MARKETNEXUS MEDIA, INC.
